creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Build failed when NOPORTDOCS set is, 

[16:40] root@miwi /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/graphics/libwpg# make 
-DNOPORTDOCS "Makefile", line 27: Unassociated shell command 
"@${REINPLACE_CMD} -E '/^SUBDIRS = /s/docs//g' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in" 
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue 


could you please fix this. 

-Martin
